patterns_discovered: Centralized service pattern for token refresh operations
Mutex pattern using Completer and boolean flag to prevent concurrent refresh attempts
Retry logic with configurable max attempts (3)
gotchas_discovered: Potential memory leaks if dispose() is not called
StreamController requires proper cleanup to prevent resource leaks
Exponential backoff calculation could overflow if not clamped
Mutex pattern relies on manual boolean flag management
Network vs credential error distinction is critical for retry logic
Unexpected errors need proper wrapping in AuthException
Circular dependency risk if service depends on repository that depends on service

approach_outcome.approach: Implemented a robust, centralized TokenRefreshService with comprehensive retry logic and concurrency control
tradeoffs: Added memory management overhead with StreamController
Mutex pattern adds some performance overhead

recommendations: Add unit tests for retry logic and exponential backoff calculations
Consider adding timeout configuration for individual refresh attempts
Implement circuit breaker pattern for repeated failures
Add logging for better debugging in production
Consider dependency injection for better testability
Add configuration options for max attempts and backoff parameters
Implement periodic refresh logic to avoid token expiration
